Aaron Gordon

Aaron Addison Gordon ▪ Instagram: aarongordon

(Air Gordon, Mr. Nugget)

Position: Power Forward and Small Forward ▪ Shoots: Right

6-8, 235lb (203cm, 106kg)

Team: Denver Nuggets

Born: September 16, 1995 (Age: 30-300d) in San Jose, California us

Relatives: Brother Drew Gordon

College: Arizona

High School: Archbishop Mitty in San Jose, California

Recruiting Rank: 2013 (4)

Draft: Orlando Magic, 1st round (4th pick, 4th overall), 2014 NBA Draft

NBA Debut: October 28, 2014

Experience: 12 years

  • 2023 NBA Champ
+2

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.

2019-20 NBA 1 (17th)
2020-21 NBA 1 (17th)

Hall of Fame Probability

Hall of Fame Probability

0.0%

Transactions

June 26, 2014: Drafted by the Orlando Magic in the 1st round (4th pick) of the 2014 NBA Draft.

July 2, 2014: Signed a multi-year contract with the Orlando Magic.

July 6, 2018: Signed as a free agent with the Orlando Magic.

March 25, 2021: Traded by the Orlando Magic with Gary Clark to the Denver Nuggets for R.J. Hampton, Gary Harris and a 2025 1st round draft pick (Jase Richardson was later selected). Denver also received a trade exception Orlando also received a trade exception 2025 1st-rd pick (DEN own) is top-5 protected and conveys to 2026 and 2027 with the same protection

September 27, 2021: Signed a contract extension with the Denver Nuggets.

October 21, 2024: Signed a contract extension with the Denver Nuggets.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Aaron Gordon?

Aaron Gordon is 30 years old.

Where was Aaron Gordon born?

Aaron Gordon was born in San Jose, California.

When was Aaron Gordon born?

Aaron Gordon was born on September 16, 1995.

How tall is Aaron Gordon?

Aaron Gordon is 6-8 (203 cm) tall.

How much does Aaron Gordon weigh?

Aaron Gordon weighs 235 lbs (106 kg).

Is Aaron Gordon in the Hall of Fame?

Aaron Gordon is not in the Hall of Fame.

When was Aaron Gordon drafted?

Aaron Gordon was drafted by Orlando Magic, 1st round (4th pick, 4th overall), 2014 NBA Draft.

What position does Aaron Gordon play?

Power Forward and Small Forward.

What is Aaron Gordon's net worth?

Aaron Gordon has made at least $181,659,461 playing professional basketball.

How much does Aaron Gordon make?

Aaron Gordon made $22,841,455 in 2025.

How many rings does Aaron Gordon have?

Aaron Gordon has won one championship.

What is Aaron Gordon's Instagram account?

Aaron Gordon is on Instagram at aarongordon.

What schools did Aaron Gordon attend?

Aaron Gordon attended Archbishop Mitty in San Jose, California and Arizona.

What are Aaron Gordon's nicknames?

Air Gordon, Mr. Nugget are nicknames for Aaron Gordon.
